death-by-chocolate-mousse.name: Death By Chocolate Mousse
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Generously grease a 9-inch springform pan with 2 3/4-inch sides.
Make crust: Mix together crushed cookies and butter in a medium bowl until well combined. Press mixture evenly into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes. Set aside to cool.

Make filling: Combine 1 cup cream, chocolate chips, vanilla, and salt in the top of a double boiler. Heat, stirring occasionally, until chocolate is fully melted and mixture is smooth. Pour chocolate mixture into a large bowl; cool to room temperature, stirring occasionally.

Beat 2 cups cream in a second large bowl until stiff peaks form. Fold into chocolate mixture until well combined. Pour mixture into cooled crust. Chill pie in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours before topping and serving.
Make topping: Beat chilled cream and sugar with an electric mixer in a medium bowl until stiff. Pipe onto the top of pie with a star tip, or spoon dollops onto each slice to serve.

debs-bread-and-butter-pickles.name: Deb's Bread And Butter Pickles
instructions: Stir 2 quarts of water and salt in a large pot until salt dissolves. Submerge cucumbers in water. Add ice to water to keep cold. Let cucumbers soak for 2 hours.
Drain salt water; rinse and drain cucumber slices twice.

Stir sugar, 4 cups water, apple cider vinegar, turmeric, mustard seed, and celery seed together in a large pot; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; add cucumber slices. Simmer until cucumbers are completely hot, but do not bring to a boil, about 10 minutes.

Sterilize canning jars and lids in boiling water for at least 5 minutes. Pack cucumbers into hot, sterilized jars, filling the jars to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a knife or a thin spatula around the insides of the jars after they have been filled to remove any air bubbles. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any food residue. Top with lids, and screw-on rings.
Let cucumbers pickle for 2 weeks before eating, shaking each jar once daily.

deda-dip.name: Deda Dip
instructions: Cut assorted veggies into bite size pieces.
Mix mayonnaise and sour cream together. Then, add in beau monde seasoning and dill.
Serve.

deep-fried-corn-meal-sticks-sorullitos-d.name: Deep Fried Corn Meal Sticks (sorullitos De Maiz) With Dipping Sauce
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a saucepan. Stir in sugar, butter, and salt; cook until sugar dissolved. Reduce heat to low; whisk in 1 cup cornmeal until smooth. Stir in remaining 1/2 cup cornmeal to make a very thick, workable dough.
Heat 3 cups vegetable oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Meanwhile, grease your hands well with 2 teaspoons vegetable oil. Scoop about 3 tablespoons cornmeal dough; roll into a ball, then shape into a 3-inch long stick about 1/2-inch wide. Repeat with remaining dough, oiling your hands as needed.
Deep fry cornmeal sticks, working in batches of 3 or 4 at a time, until golden brown. Drain on paper towels and keep warm.
Whisk mayonnaise, ketchup, and garlic salt together in a bowl until well combined. Serve cornmeal sticks with dipping sauce.

instructions: He finally pics his place and his garlic. In a frying pan with medium heat, melt the butter and fry both ingredients until they are clear and ungolden.

Incorpora la pimienta verde, el tomillo, la nuez moscada, el laurel, sal y pimienta negra. Mezcla bien.
Fold with brandy or cognac and let the alcohol evaporate for 1 to 2 minutes.
Withdraw the bay leaf and carry all preparations to a processor or blender.
Add milk cream and process to get a very fine and homogenous dough.
Ajusta de sal y pimienta si es necesario.
Fold pate into a small mold or glass bottle.
Opcionalmente, cubre la superficie con una fina capa de mantequilla derretida para conservar mejor.
Refrigera al menos 4 horas antes de consumir para que tome cuerpo y sabor.

delicious-christmas-coffee-to-enjoy-at-h.name: Delicious Christmas Coffee To Enjoy At Home
delicious-christmas-coffee-to-enjoy-at-h.original_name: Delicioso café navideño para disfrutar en casa

ingredients.item: 2 cups of freshly made strong coffee (ideally from medium to dark)
1 cup of whole milk or vegetable drink (oatmeal or almond will be very creamy)
2 cds of paddle or chewed sugar
1  tira de piel de naranja (sin la parte blanca)
1 cda of coconut cream or condensed milk (optional for warmer)
1  toque de licor opcional: ron dorado, brandy o baileys  (1 cucharada por persona)
Crema batida casera o espuma de leche para servir
Cacao en polvo o ralladura de chocolate para decorar

instructions: Prepare strong coffee as a basis: can be leaked, French or espresso press but should be focused and aromatic.
In a small pot, heats milk with cinnamon, nails, orange skin and panels. Don't let them get drunk to stop the milk from cutting.
Remueve lentamente hasta que la panela se disuelva y la leche tome aroma a especias.
Take back the nails and the orange skin. Keep the cinnamon to intensify the smell.
Agrega la vainilla y la nuez moscada. Mezcla bien.
Incorporate hot coffee and try the sweeter. If you want a more creamy drink, add coconut cream or condensed milk.
If you want an adult version, add the liquor at this point.
Serves in high cups or thermal cups.
Decora con espuma de leche, crema batida o un poco de cacao.
Termina con un toque de ralladura de naranja o chocolate.

Then you'll add his tomato and his onion and his corn.
Finally, add mayonnaise and salt taste. Mix to achieve a homogenous and well integrated paste.
Now, you're gonna get the peaches and fill them with the tuna mix.

deviled-cheese-toasts.name: Deviled Cheese Toasts
instructions: Preheat broiler. Combine cheddar, pickles, mayonnaise, and pimientos in a medium bowl; season with salt and hot sauce. Spread on bread and broil until melted, about 4 minutes.

duck-rice-with-orange-teleculinaria.name: Duck Rice With Orange
instructions: Fix the duck and cut it to pieces. Light a large pot with water, 1 onion cut into bedrooms, peeled carrot, 2 whole garlic teeth, 1 bay leaf and pepper beans. Let it boil, add the duck, bacon and chorizo and let it cook until the duck becomes soft.

Remove the duck, sausage and bacon from the pot and let it cool. Clean the duck of skin and bones and challenge it. Coe 1 l of the cooking broth, lie back in the pot and lead to the heat until boiling.

Descasque e pique finamente os restantes alhos e cebola. Deite num tacho, junte a raspa da casca de 1 laranja, a restante folha de louro e o azeite, leve ao lume e deixe alourar. Adicione depois o arroz, envolva e acrescente o caldo a ferver. Retifique os temperos de sal e pimenta, mexa, tape e deixe cozinhar durante 18 minutos, em lume muito brando.

When you remove the pan from the fire, water it with the juice of the remaining orange, stir with a fork and re-tune the seasonings. Finally, wrap the shredded duck, lie on a board and smooth. Have the sausage cut into slices, the bacon sliced and the carrot in pieces. Take it to the oven, preheated at 200°C, until it is coloured or just until it warms up. Serve decorated with orange rings.

dutch-oven-macaroni-and-cheese.name: Dutch Oven Macaroni And Cheese
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add shells and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 9 minutes. Drain and set aside.

Heat an oven-safe Dutch oven over medium heat. Melt butter and flour in the hot pot, stirring, until blended; pour in milk and heavy cream, whisking continuously, until mixture comes to a boil. Continue to boil, stirring continuously, for 2 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low; continue to stir until sauce thickens, about 10 minutes.
Slowly fold in cheeses until melted and smooth. It is okay to raise the heat if you have to, just remember to keep stirring while the heat is on. Fold in cooked pasta until it is coated with cheese.

Combine panko bread crumbs, salt, garlic salt, black pepper, onion powder, and taco seasoning in a bowl. Sprinkle macaroni mixture with just enough of the bread crumbs to coat most of the surface; you should still see some pasta underneath the bread crumbs.

Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Turn on the oven's broiler and continue to cook until crust is golden brown and crisp, about 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from the oven and let sit for at least 15 to 20 minutes before serving.
